rationale: Keep: both papers are directly in brand-extension evaluation and share core constructs around fit/similarity and when fit drives judgments (citing note: fit vs parent-brand quality under context; cited note: affect route vs similarity/fit mediation boundary conditions). The citing paper’s stated gap is about prior fit-based drivers, and the cited paper is a substantive prior test of those mechanisms rather than an incidental domain mention; the DOI match confirms it is the exact referenced work.
